testcase.name: test_build_nutzungsmeldung_xlsx_from_temporary_db_and_template

failure.message:
_duckdb.BinderException: Binder Error: Referenced column "rule_id" not found in FROM clause! Candidate bindings: "blocker_date"
LINE 5: ... distinct cast(blocker_date as varchar) || ': ' || rule_id, ^

E Candidate bindings: "blocker_date" E E LINE 5: ... distinct cast(blocker_date as varchar) || ': ' || rule_id, E ^

testcase.name: test_gap_context_classification_and_cold_stand_candidate
testcase.failure: tests\test_phase6c_context_and_segments.py:58: in test_gap_context_classification_and_cold_stand_candidate assert row == ("Hamburg", 600, "POTENTIAL_COLD_STAND") E AssertionError: assert None == ('Hamburg', 600, 'POTENTIAL_COLD_STAND')

testcase.name: test_central_de_segments_use_border_bounded_times
testcase.failure: tests\test_phase6c_context_and_segments.py:139: in test_central_de_segments_use_border_bounded_times assert row == (datetime(2026, 6, 1, 9), datetime(2026, 6, 1, 10), 2) E assert None == (datetime.datetime(2026, 6, 1, 9, 0), datetime.datetime(2026, 6, 1, 10, 0), 2)
